intent: Build a simple Python task management library (tasklib). It is not a production system. Its purpose is to validate that the Crafted Dev Agent build pipeline can close a complete dependency chain — from documentation through scaffold to working code — with real merges at each step.
scope_statement:
Build a minimal Python task management library (tasklib) as defined in TRD-TASKLIB, comprising a documentation set (README, ARCHITECTURE, API reference), a Python package scaffold under src/tasklib/ with models/ and storage/ subpackages, a Task dataclass with TaskStatus enumeration (FR-1 through FR-7), an InMemoryTaskStore with add/get/list/complete/delete operations (FR-8 through FR-14), and a CLI entry point supporting add/list/complete commands (FR-15 through FR-19), with a package root re-exporting the public API (FR-20). The full dependency chain must close in order: docs → scaffold → task model → storage → CLI, validating that the Crafted Dev Agent build pipeline can resolve merge gates and cross-PR import dependencies end-to-end.

Operator on 'TRD-TASKLIB Section 6 limits PRs to 3 implementation files a':
it is okay to combine

Operator on 'FR-1 specifies 'a unique identifier generated automatically ':
use whatever makes sense for the task

Operator on 'Section 5 acceptance criteria require tests (e.g., serializa':
Section 5 acceptance criteria require tests (e.g., serialization round-trip, KeyError on missing complete, creation-order listing) — should tests be co-located in a tests/ directory mirroring the src/ layout, and should they be included in the same PR as their corresponding implementation or in a separate testing PR?

Operator on 'The CLI (FR-15) must be 'runnable as a Python module' — shou':
the CLI must be invocable from the command line you decide the mechanism

prd_plan.title: Documentation Set: README, ARCHITECTURE, and API Reference
Python Package Scaffold with Subpackage Directories
Task Dataclass and TaskStatus Enumeration with Tests
InMemoryTaskStore with CRUD Operations and Tests
CLI Entry Point with add/list/complete Commands and Tests
Package Root Public API Re-export and End-to-End Integration Tests
